heading: Working capital fund; availability for common personnel support services
label: 3513b Working capital fund; availability for common personnel support services
text: The Working Capital Fund of the Department of Health and Human Services shall on and after , be available for expenses necessary for common personnel support services in the Washington area.August 10, 1971
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of title II of , popularly known as the Department of Health, Education, and Welfare Appropriation Act, 1972.Pub. L. 92–80Section was formerly classified to .section 905a of this title

Change of Name“Department of Health and Human Services” substituted in text for “Department of Health, Education, and Welfare” pursuant to , which is classified to , Education.section 509(b) of Pub. L. 96–88section 3508(b) of Title 20
